title: gynopleura humilis
intro: Gynopleura humilis, also known as the False Dragonhead, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The medicinal properties of Gynopleura humilis lie in its ability to exhibit antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. This plant is known for its various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating cold symptoms, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. Gynopleura humilis can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
